items.title: U.S. strikes Iran for third day, will reimpose blockade

items.title: Kenya: Rights groups warn of growing 'goon' culture
items.description: Kenya is witnessing a growing use of hired gangs by political actors to intimidate opponents, disrupt protests and silence dissent, rights advocates warn.

items.title: France opens terror probe after gun found in Jewish suburb
items.description: Police said they found a "military-grade weapon" during the search of a suspicious car parked in a Paris neighborhood with a large Jewish population.

items.title: China expels senior Communist party leader in anti-corruption crackdown
items.description: Ma Xingrui is the third member of the 24-member Politburo to come under investigation during the current party term that began in 2022, a rare occurrence in the recent history of the 105-year-old party

items.title: Heavy rain collapses roof and kills 11 people in northwest Pakistan
